Interface INetworkEdge

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of this network edge element.

[Guid("EADCD556-0857-41D9-9714-03B0DBB16DFB")]
public interface INetworkEdge : INetworkElement

QueryCoveredEdge(int, INetworkEdge)

Used to iterate over the edges covered by this edge.

void QueryCoveredEdge(int Index, INetworkEdge Edge)

Parameters

Index int
Edge INetworkEdge

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryCoveringHyperedge(INetworkEdge, out double, out double)

Queries the covering hyperedge of the network edge element and returns its related positions along the covering hyperedge.

void QueryCoveringHyperedge(INetworkEdge Edge, out double fromPosition, out double toPosition)

Parameters

Edge INetworkEdge
fromPosition double
toPosition double

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryEdgeInOtherDirection(INetworkEdge)

Queries the network edge element corresponding to the reverse traversal of this network edge element.

void QueryEdgeInOtherDirection(INetworkEdge Edge)

Parameters

Edge INetworkEdge

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryJunctions(INetworkJunction, INetworkJunction)

Queries the network junction elements adjacent to this network edge element.

void QueryJunctions(INetworkJunction FromJunction, INetworkJunction ToJunction)

Parameters

FromJunction INetworkJunction
ToJunction INetworkJunction

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryPositions(out double, out double)

Queries the positions along the source object at which the from-end and to-end of the network edge element lies.

void QueryPositions(out double fromPosition, out double toPosition)

Parameters

fromPosition double
toPosition double

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryTurn(int, INetworkTurn)

Queries the index'th network turn element in which this network edge element participates.

void QueryTurn(int Index, INetworkTurn Turn)

Parameters

Index int
Turn INetworkTurn
